_doc: Action definitions. range = max manhattan distance to target. Batch 1: social + production + exploration + creative.

talk.description: Converse with a nearby person. Builds trust and social memory.

teach.description: Share a skill with a nearby person. Target gains observation progress.

trade.description: Exchange items with a nearby person.

gift.description: Give items to a nearby person. Increases trust significantly.

comfort.description: Console a distressed nearby person. Calms their emotion.

craft.description: Create a tool or item from raw materials.

fish.description: Catch fish from adjacent water tile.

scout.description: Survey the surroundings carefully. Reveals tiles in extended radius.

experiment.description: Try combining items in new ways. May discover a recipe.
